{{Quote|Chu-Gon Dar was a Jedi Master that lived thousands of years ago during the era of the Old Republic. He resided at the Jedi Temple here on Mustafar and his knowledge and understanding of the Physical Force was unmatched by any other.|[[Ithes Olok]]|<ref name="Lost Treasure">{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?page=Lost%20Treasure&resource=features|text=Lost Treasure}}</ref>}}
'''Chu-Gon Dar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] who took his residence on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]], within the [[Jedi enclave (Mustafar)/Legends|Enclave]] there. His mastery of the [[Physical Force]] was unmatched throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], until his death. He created the [[Chu-Gon Dar cube]] which had the power to transform certain specific items.

==Behind the scenes==
Chu-Gon Dar was mentioned in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. The name is spelled "Chu-Don Gar" in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
